title: CoverageRequirement
description: A specification of coverage criteria that must be satisfied for a TestCoverageTarget, defining which input partitions, context variations, and outcome categories must be exercised per IEEE 829-2008 test design specification requirements. The specific partitions, context variations, and outcome categories are associated via relationships (to InputPartitionSelection, ContextVariation, and OutcomeCategory nodes) rather than direct attributes.

coverageCriteria.description: The coverage strategy defining which combinations of partition values must be exercised

priority.description: Relative importance of fulfilling this coverage requirement
